reviews.comment:
A puerto pirámides cuando no hay ballenas no tiene sentido ir ademas los pocos lugares q hay para comer te cobran carisimo en un lugar llamado quimei quipay 1milanesa con papas fritas 1rabas y gaseosa chica $400

(Translated by Google)
There's no point going to Puerto Pirámides when there aren't any whales. Besides, the few places to eat there are incredibly expensive. At a place called Quimei Quipay, a breaded cutlet with fries, calamari, and a small soda cost $400.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16378069522629065446/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBZzREbkNREAE
